---
title: "Noot-Noot"
---

> Round and round we spin, with feet of lead and wings of tin.
>
>  &mdash;  Kurt Vonnegut                                       

Welcome. I write about a random assortment of topics —
data, R, statistics, and Ireland (in all its vices and virtues).

## Recent Thoughts

```{r echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
dirs <- list.dirs("posts", recursive = FALSE, full.names = FALSE)
dirs <- sort(dirs[file.exists(file.path("posts", dirs, "index.Rmd"))], decreasing = TRUE)

# Staged release: hide posts whose folder date hasn't arrived yet.
# (Deployment also excludes these folders — see .github/workflows/deploy.yml —
# so unpublished posts are neither listed nor reachable by direct URL.)
dir_dates <- as.Date(substr(dirs, 1, 10), format = "%Y-%m-%d")
dirs <- dirs[is.na(dir_dates) | dir_dates <= Sys.Date()]

for (dir in head(dirs, 5)) {
  lines <- readLines(file.path("posts", dir, "index.Rmd"), n = 30, warn = FALSE)
  delims <- which(lines == "---")
  if (length(delims) < 2) next
  yaml_lines <- lines[(delims[1] + 1):(delims[2] - 1)]
  title <- sub('^title:\\s*[\'"]?(.+?)[\'"]?\\s*$', "\\1",
               grep("^title:", yaml_lines, value = TRUE)[1])
  date  <- sub("^date:\\s*(.+?)\\s*$", "\\1",
               grep("^date:", yaml_lines, value = TRUE)[1])
  cat(sprintf("- **[%s](/posts/%s/index.html)** &mdash; %s\n", title, dir, date))
}
```

[All posts &rarr;](/posts/)
